artifact.content_preview:
From: j.henderson@techsupplier.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: bob.morrison@ssc-spc.gc.ca; ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update
Date: Mon, 2 Mar 2026 09:14:32 -0500

Alice,

Following our call on Friday, I wanted to confirm in writing the situation
with the Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches for the NGIS Phase 3 data centre
migration.

Unfortunately, our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse
management system failure that has affected ou

extracted_tasks.text: Contact to confirm how TechSupplier can best support planning activities during this disruption
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Please let me know how we can best support your planning activities during this disruption.

extracted_tasks.text: Confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst switches
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Jason, can you please confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst switches?

extracted_tasks.text: Ensure equipment is on site no later than March 6 for staging and testing
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Our migration window opens March 8 and we need the equipment on site no later than March 6 for staging and testing.
